summary: Duplex Doppler ultrasonography has not been established or validated as a method for detecting esophageal varices in patients with compensated hepatic cirrhosis; current guidelines support endoscopic evaluation as the definitive approach due to its proven accuracy and reliability. The absence of supportive literature indicates it lacks sufficient sensitivity and specificity compared to endoscopy.
